BRCA Genetic Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/brca-test/ 
BRCA Genetic Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a BRCA genetic test? 
BRCA is short for "breast cancer gene." A BRCA genetic test uses a sample of your blood, saliva (spit), or cells from inside of your cheek to look for changes in your BRCA1 and BRCA2 genes. Genes are parts of DNA in your cells that you inherit from your parents. You inherit two copies of each gene, one from each parent. Genes carry information that controls wh
